meaning: n.嫌疑犯adj.令人怀疑的,不可信的,可疑的v.怀疑,猜想,对...有所觉察
examples: He is the prime suspect in the case.
Officials had been searching for Akein Scott since identifying him as a suspect on Monday.
When, however, people watched the recording from the perspective of the suspect, suddenly the interview appeared more coercive.
